message:
bd-rrfvc perf(btree): cache parsed cell slots per page

Cache parsed cell slot metadata behind a 64-entry cursor-local LRU keyed by page number and page-image mutation signature.

Route index leaf binary search through parse_cell_at so repeated probes reuse cached slots while page rewrites naturally miss after mutation.

Validation: rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_fsqlite_cod1 cargo test -p fsqlite-btree cell_slot_cache -- --nocapture; rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_fsqlite_cod1 cargo clippy -p fsqlite-btree --all-targets -- -D warnings; cargo fmt --check -p fsqlite-btree; ubs crates/fsqlite-btree/Cargo.toml crates/fsqlite-btree/src/cursor.rs
